specific_question: What was the most common technical support issue reported by our clients in Q4 2024?
answer: The top issue for MediConn Solutions clients in Q4 2024 was initial login failures following a security upgrade, which support teams were reportedly able to resolve within 8 hours of the lodgment of the support ticket.
